description_long: This is a compact, box-shaped projector with a white main body and a prominent black lens on the front face. The top of the device features a sturdy black mounting bracket attached to a vertical black pole, suggesting it is designed for fixed installation. Two thick yellow cables extend from the rear and side, likely for power and data connectivity. The front face displays the word 'BEEM' in red and black, accompanied by a small red cross, resembling a brand logo. The right side of the device has a series of vertical ventilation slats, while the left and rear sides are mostly plain except for the cable entry points and mounting hardware. The overall design is industrial and robust, suitable for urban or public environments.
description: A robust, white box projector with a black lens, yellow cables, and a black mounting pole, featuring a 'BEEM' logo and side ventilation slats.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black lens, 'BEEM' logo, and mounting bracket clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the plain white side and the yellow cables looping from the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the yellow cables entering the body and the vertical ventilation slats.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the mounting bracket and cable entry, with the lens barely visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The logo 'BEEM' in black and red with a red cross is visible on the front face of the projector, styled in a modern, sans-serif font.
attribute_lens_type: fixed lens, circular, medium size, with a visible adjustment ring around the edge
attribute_control_panel_design: A single black button is visible on the front left; no other control panel is apparent.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Vertical slats on the right side of the body, arranged in a parallel pattern for airflow.
